blended.narrative: Discovery is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,180 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 17.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
